yesterdayAnalysis: Easy 14.6mi ROUVY course preview ride at TSS 20, HR 118 — perfectly aligned with race week protocol. Low intensity (HR well below race effort) while familiarizing with the Oregon course terrain is exactly what's needed 5 days out. This keeps legs loose without accumulating fatigue.
todayRecommendation: Execute the planned 2,000yd easy aerobic swim plus easy 3mi run exactly as prescribed. Keep HR low (under 130), prioritize feeling fresh over any intensity. This is about maintaining neural patterns and confidence, not fitness gains.
weekProgress: Week 13 of 13: Currently at 33 TSS of 150 target (22%) with 5 days remaining including today. Monday's pool session and today's swim+run are maintaining sharpness while preserving energy for race day Sunday.
keyInsight: Race week execution is textbook so far — low-stress course preview, controlled HR, maintaining movement patterns without fatigue accumulation ahead of your 70.3 tuneup race.
